name: hud_ui_element_constructor
description: HudUiElement::Constructor initializes the base element, dispatches common invalidate slot 8, and clears the blit source through the base clip helper.
known_limits: VC6 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare remains blocked by 12 unmasked mismatches after relocation masking and 14 trailing NOPs trimmed.

Reviewed drift is limited to constructor argument scheduling: retail loads initX first, stores initY before initX, then dispatches slot 8; VC6 keeps the same side effects but loads/stores the two coordinates in the opposite order before the dispatch.

The ftable identity, parent/next/timer zeroing, fastcall slot-8 invalidate dispatch, flags/state clearing, SetBltSourceAndClipRect call, return value, and thiscall stack cleanup are covered by source review, VC artifacts, and the native smoke.
